generated_exposure.exposure_text: I'm a veteran who's seen firsthand how strategic autonomy keeps us safe. The idea that we can rely on others for our security is naive. We need to invest in our own defenses, not just for national security but to protect our civil liberties. Look at how prepared we were during the last crisis—it wasn't perfect, but it was better than nothing. We can't afford to be complacent. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
